caption: The video features two men seated at a table during what appears to be a professional panel discussion or interview, likely related to big data, as indicated by the "#BigDataSV 2015" branding on the backdrop and the table. The man on the right, dressed in a gray suit with a tie, is actively speaking and gesturing with his hands, emphasizing his points. He has a microphone attached to his lapel, suggesting he is addressing an audience. The man on the left, wearing a dark suit, listens attentively with his hands clasped together. Both have laptops in front of them, possibly for reference or presentation purposes. The setting is formal, with a backdrop featuring logos and hashtags, indicating a structured event or conference environment.
